
# cloudru_evolution_spark_version_collection (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudru_evolution_spark_version_collection" "datasource_version" {
  project_id = "0000-0000-0000-0000-0000"
}

output "data-version" {
  value = data.cloudru_evolution_spark_version_collection.datasource_version.spark_versions[0]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) Идентификатор проекта.

### Read-Only

- `spark_versions` (Attributes List) Список доступных версий Managed Spark. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spark_versions))

<a id="nestedatt--spark_versions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spark_versions`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Описание.
- `managed_spark_version` (String) Номер версии Managed Spark.
- `name` (String) Название.
- `version_id` (String) Идентификатор версии.
